title: A royal ambience with a lavish spread of pure veg food.
paragraphs: Aaradhya Grand specializes in delicious food featuring fresh ingredients and masterful preparation by the Aaradhya Grand culinary team. Located on NH-75 near Nandini Palace in Kolar, Karnataka, we've been serving the community since 2017.

Aaradhya Grand's lively, casual yet upscale atmosphere makes it perfect for dining with friends, family, clients and business associates. With a wide range of dosa varieties, South Indian dishes, North Indian curries, and unique items like vada curry dosa and paneer keema — there's something for everyone.

With over 7,900 Google reviews and a 4.3-star rating, Aaradhya Grand has become a must-stop destination on the highway for travellers heading to Tirupati or craving authentic South Indian veg food. Our Devanahalli branch extends this experience to more guests.

pillars.title: Pure Vegetarian
pillars.description: 100% vegetarian restaurant with vegan options — from South Indian breakfast to North Indian curries, kofta specials, and fresh beverages.

pillars.title: Fresh Ingredients
pillars.description: Each dish is crafted with quality, fresh ingredients and masterful preparation that brings out authentic flavors.

pillars.title: Highway Gem
pillars.description: A perfect stop on NH-75 for families and travellers — ample parking, quick service, and food that never disappoints.
